data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. BAD BLUE JAY turned in a plain performance last time when sixth at this track over 324m behind Noir (18.04) in a Grade 5. Scored at his previous run. Key runner on his best form. 8. MODELING was resuming when finishing sixth at this track in a Grade 5 (18.22). Will be much improved. Has ability and is one of the better chances. 3. SORENTO TO EXCEL is worth forgiving last start after finishing seventh (20.56) in a Grade 5 at Bulli over 340m. The form from his last run stacks up well. Should be thereabouts. 1. HARD YARDS is in the mix despite finishing out of the placings here last start.","runners":[2,8,3,1],"exclusive":false}
